meaning: n.毂,木片,中心;n.网络集线器,网络中心
examples: The island's social hub is the Cafe Sport.
This grand building in the centre of town used to be the hub of the capital's social life.
It's not yet the futuristic international business hub that planners imagined.
Frontier Airlines has grabbed nearly 20% of domestic traffic in Denver, a United hub.
If Bangalore is India s software services capital, Gurgaon is the call center hub.
